title: Documentation for Status Labels
excerpt: Hi there, I’m new to monday so sorry if this is a silly question.  My team has one main board that uses a few status column labels that have a LOT of labels.  All of the labels require different things from different peo…

posts.author: mlinder (Matthew Linder)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I’m new to monday so sorry if this is a silly question. My team has one main board that uses a few status column labels that have a LOT of labels. All of the labels require different things from different people, and while onboarding a teammate, we realized we had no training material to go along with our many labels. Is there any easy way to set up something like this with monday?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mlinder Hey Matthew; I’m not sure I understand the question fully; but if you are looking to provide documentation for the status labels you could create a board that has all the status labels listed and a text / long text column that describes what is needed for each;

If there are multiple steps involved for each status label you could create subitems to describe each step for the labels.

alternatively you could use a workcanvas diagram or monday doc to accomplish similiar documentation and point new hires to that.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Matthew. Our new app Status Label Directory should help out a lot in this specific instance. It will allow you to create documentation for status labels in a board view that automatically populates a live list of the labels. Hope it helps!
